<!-- consumed by: .github/scripts/pretooluse-flutter-env-guard.sh -->
Editing `client/.env`: neither a hot reload nor a browser reload picks up the change — the dev server fetches `/.env` once at process startup and caches it for the life of the process, so a clean restart is required to serve the new values. Also worth checking while you're in here: never point a local build at production, and keep `CMS_API` paired with the `SYNAPSE_URL` environment — the client sends the Matrix access token as the CMS bearer, so a mismatched pair (e.g. a local token against the staging CMS) returns 403 and content silently fails to load.
